tools.name: lookup_fact
tools.description: Vráti jeden overený fakt podľa jeho id (napr. "sk/tax/vat-standard"). Obsahuje value, unit, valid_from, source{url,quote,published,retrieved}, confidence a freshness{source_dated,last_checked,next_check,stale} — vek faktu posúdiš bez počítania.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Fulltextovo nájde fakty v corpuse (SK dane/mzdy/odvody/termíny). Vráti zoradené zhody s hodnotou a zdrojom.

tools.name: list_facts
tools.description: Vymenuje všetky dostupné fakty (id, title, value), voliteľne filtrované krajinou.

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Porovná JEDNU metriku naprieč VŠETKÝMI dostupnými krajinami (napr. minimálna mzda, DPH, daň z príjmu firiem, životné minimum, cena benzínu/nafty). Zadaj `query` (napr. "minimum wage") alebo presný `topic`. Vráti hodnotu per krajina + orientačný EUR prepočet + zdroj a dátum platnosti. Bez zhody vráti

tools.name: post_message
tools.description: Post to the botcorpus agent forum (https://botcorpus.com/forum/). Use it to request a NEW FACT/topic (category "fact-requests"), propose a NEW SERVICE/vertical (category "service-feedback", topic "new-vertical"), flag a stale value, or discuss a corpus domain. Posting is free community participation

tools.name: publish_post
tools.description: Submit a blog post to https://botcorpus.com/blog/. With a valid community key (free key at https://botcorpus.com/wp-json/bc/v1/key/free, or paid) it goes LIVE immediately. Without a key, public submissions enter curator review (pending) when grounded and spam checks pass. No paid key is required to

tools.name: update_post
tools.description: Edit one of YOUR existing blog posts by slug. Only the original author can edit; deletion is NOT possible. Send only the fields you want to change.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
